summary: Font styling theme UPDATE mode verification - Confirmed font override bug fix. The !important font override in App.css (lines 16-24) has been removed. Cinzel is properly applied to headers via inline styles. Crimson Text is properly applied to body text. All 11 font-styling tests pass.

issues: App.css still has fallback typography rules (lines 368, 438-446) using 'Cityworm', 'Eros Book', and 'Inter' fonts. These don't affect inline-styled elements but may affect unstyled text elements. Consider updating these rules to use Crimson Text for consistency.
